title: malus × scheideckeri
intro: Malus × scheideckeri, also known as the Scheidecker crabapple, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Malus baccata and Malus prunifolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Malus × scheideckeri include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Malus × scheideckeri, such as teas and extracts, are used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
